Factory-Direct Pricing — No Middlemen

Transparent Pricing for Custom Apparel Manufacturing

What you see is what you pay. No hidden fees, no surprise shipping costs, no agent commissions. Prices include everything from factory floor to your door.

T-Shirts from $5.50 Hoodies from $12.00 Uniforms from $9.00 Caps from $4.50
2026 Price List

Custom Apparel Pricing Per Unit

All prices are FOB factory at MOQ. Volume discounts automatically applied. Free DHL shipping on samples.

Product MOQ Price (at MOQ) Price (500+ units) Lead Time Includes
Heavyweight T-Shirt
180-220gsm cotton, oversized/boxy fit		 50 pcs $5.50 $3.85 2-3 weeks Custom label
Premium Hoodie
280-350gsm French terry/fleece		 50 pcs $12.00 $8.40 3-4 weeks Custom label
Crewneck Sweatshirt
260-300gsm fleece lined		 50 pcs $11.00 $7.70 3-4 weeks Custom label
Sports Jersey (Sublimated)
Polyester, all-over print, names/numbers		 20 sets $14.00 $9.80 2-3 weeks Full customization
Soccer Kit (Full Set)
Jersey + shorts + socks, sublimated		 15 sets $16.00 $11.20 2-3 weeks Full set included
Tracksuit Set
Zip jacket + matching joggers		 50 sets $18.00 $12.60 3-4 weeks Custom label
Gym / Activewear Set
Leggings + sports bra, seamless		 50 sets $11.00 $7.70 3-4 weeks Custom label
Corporate Polo Shirt
Cotton pique, embroidered logo		 50 pcs $9.00 $6.30 2-3 weeks Embroidery
Bomber / Varsity Jacket
Wool body, leather sleeves, chenille		 50 pcs $28.00 $19.60 4-5 weeks Chenille patches
Baseball Cap
3D puff embroidery, snapback		 100 pcs $4.50 $3.15 2-3 weeks Full embroidery
Streetwear Acid Wash Tee
Garment dyed, vintage finish, boxy		 50 pcs $8.50 $5.95 3-4 weeks Custom label
Windbreaker Jacket
Lightweight nylon, water-resistant		 50 pcs $15.00 $10.50 3-4 weeks Custom label

From pattern to finished garment		 100 pcs $8.00+ $5.60+ 4-5 weeks Pattern making
Cycling Jersey
Full sublimation, 3 rear pockets		 50 pcs $15.00 $10.50 2-3 weeks Full sublimation

Decoration & Packaging Add-Ons

Customize every detail. These are added to your base garment price.

full branding package

No Hidden Fees

Every Quote Includes

✓ Free tech pack creation & design consultation
✓ Free pre-production sample (with DHL shipping)
✓ 4-stage quality control with photo documentation
✓ Custom woven label sewn into every garment
✓ Individual poly bag packaging
✓ Door-to-door shipping quote (DHL/FedEx/UPS)
✓ Dedicated project manager (English-speaking)
✓ NDA & IP protection — your designs are safe

Get Your Exact Quote in 24 Hours

Send us your design or idea. We'll reply with a detailed breakdown including production timeline and shipping costs.
